headline: DMV Fantasy: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: DMV Fantasy is projected #11 of 16 with a 73.91 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Jayden Daniels, Saquon Barkley, and George Kittle. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 79.5 C-AVI and 82.2 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 62.1 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Rachaad White's 57.1 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 84.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 3.42-point projected gap to Badland Banditos.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (Gringo’s Goblins). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 8, Gringo’s Goblins traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Tre' Harris, Emeka Egbuka, Kyren Williams, 2027 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Omarion Hampton, Chris Godwin, A.J. Brown, 2027 Round 2 (Gringo’s Goblins). Tre' Harris is now on the current roster at 40.9 C-AVI and 64.2 D-AVI; Emeka Egbuka is now the current WR starter at 85.5 C-AVI and 86.5 D-AVI; Kyren Williams is now the current RB starter at 83.3 C-AVI and 83.8 D-AVI; The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #11 of 16 at 73.91 lineup C-AVI. Badland Banditos is immediately above at 77.33, a gap of 3.42. Gringo’s Goblins is immediately behind at 70.60.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jayden Daniels (96.2), Saquon Barkley (92.0), and George Kittle (79.5).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 15, DMV Fantasy traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired George Kittle, Brenton Strange, 2026 Round 1 (Conquistadors), 2028 Round 1 (Big Balder Brand) while sending Trey McBride. George Kittle is now the current TE starter at 79.5 C-AVI and 82.2 D-AVI; Brenton Strange is now the current FLEX starter at 62.1 C-AVI and 77.4 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Rachaad White's 57.1 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 84.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 3.42-point projected gap to Badland Banditos. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Rachaad White is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 57.1. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
